forbidden.name: not-to-unresolvable
forbidden.comment: This module depends on a module that cannot be found. If it is an npm module, add it to package.json; otherwise fix the import path.

forbidden.name: no-non-package-json
forbidden.comment: This module depends on an npm package that is not declared in package.json.

forbidden.name: not-to-deprecated
forbidden.comment: This module uses a deprecated npm package. Upgrade it or replace it.

forbidden.name: no-duplicate-dep-types
forbidden.comment: This module depends on an external package declared in more than one dependency bucket.

forbidden.name: not-to-test-from-production
forbidden.comment: Production code must not import from test files. Factor shared helpers into production or test utility modules instead.

forbidden.name: production-not-to-verification
forbidden.comment: Production packages must not import verification infrastructure or concrete proofs.

forbidden.name: fluent-authoring-not-to-transport-runtime-or-substrate
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/fluent-firegrid is the transport-neutral authoring surface. Keep HTTP, Node, S2 binding, TanStack/S2 store, raw S2 substrate, and verification imports below it.

forbidden.name: fluent-http-not-to-node-s2-or-verification
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/fluent-firegrid-http is a transport binding. Keep Node hosting, S2 runtime binding, raw S2 substrate, and verification imports out of it.

forbidden.name: fluent-s2-not-to-transport-host-or-verification
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/fluent-firegrid-s2 is the S2 runtime binding. Keep HTTP transport, Node hosting, and verification imports out of it.

forbidden.name: tanstack-core-runtime-not-to-firegrid-or-s2-store
forbidden.comment: Vendored TanStack core/runtime packages should stay generic and must not depend on Firegrid product APIs, S2 stores, raw S2 substrate, or verification.

forbidden.name: tanstack-s2-store-not-to-fluent-or-verification
forbidden.comment: @firegrid/tanstack-workflow-s2 is a lower-level store/runtime adapter. Keep fluent product APIs and verification imports out of it.

forbidden.name: effect-s2-substrate-not-to-product-packages
forbidden.comment: effect-s2 is the raw S2 substrate client. It must not import Firegrid product, TanStack store/runtime, verification, or observability packages.

forbidden.name: fluent-acp-process-tiny-import-surface
forbidden.comment: fluent-acp-process is the ACP harness process owner (spawn -> acp.Stream). It must not import the durable-streams substrate or Store/Host/EventIngress/Sources/projection internals. Allowed: @agentclientprotocol/sdk + effect (+ @effect/platform).

forbidden.name: verification-runtime-not-to-proofs
forbidden.comment: The verification runtime must not import concrete proofs. Keep proof registration in packages/verification/proofs so src stays reusable verification infrastructure.
